name: LessonHint
goal: Progressive hint disclosure — reveal hints one at a time to give learners scaffolded support before giving up.
description: Shows a 'Show hint N of M' button. Each click reveals the next hint in a stacked list. The most recently revealed hint has a blue highlight. After all hints are shown the button changes to 'All hints shown' and disables. Fires lesson-hint-show with {index, hint} on each reveal. Accepts hints as a JSON string[] attribute.

props.name: hints
props.description: JSON array of hint strings to reveal one at a time.

events.name: lesson-hint-show
events.description: Fires each time a hint is revealed. detail.index is 0-based; detail.hint is the text.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Outer vertical margin + list top margin + item padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Button horizontal padding + item horizontal padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Button border, text, hover background; latest item border; hint number color.

sideEffects.description: Tracks how many hints have been shown.
sideEffects.reason: Required to progressively reveal hints and update button label.
